title: Do you think there will be a final classroom scene in 40
display_title: Do you think there will be a final classroom scene in 40
wikitext:
[]: Do you think there will be a final classroom scene in 4.0?             Quote Post by ShinjyWoruSoryu » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:34 pm As a nice little homage to the old times of eva, I would like to see just a little bit of something like this. But then again, the only kids who appear to be left are the pilots.. Even so, I feel that it would add a nice touch. What do you guys think?

[]: Re: Do you think there will be a final classroom scene in 4.             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:40 pm ShinjyWoruSoryu wrote: the only kids who appear to be left are the pilots..

[]:             Quote Post by ShinjyWoruSoryu » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:46 pm Oh yeah. How could I forget

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:49 pm There is no going back to normality after N3I + 3I + 14 years of hell + 4I. Even if things don't get worse it's gonna be a looooooong time before things can be even semi-normal. Only way a classroom scene is happening is if Asuka/Shinji/ReiQ come across the school during their trek. There could be a tiny, tiny chance that it survived the impacts. I never looked up where it is on a the maps but it's on higher ground in the hills out of the way of the main fortress city that got completely destroyed. Maybe they'll head there for higher ground to try and get a signal out to Wunder. Maybe they'll even camp for the night. But that's already wanking a bit much.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:58 pm If some kind of Instrumentality happens maybe we see something similar to the alternative universe in 26?

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Jul 02, 2013 12:15 am Classroom scene? The main cast isn't even school-age anymore, and that includes Sakura. The school's probably been destroyed anyways. Yeah, the only way i'd see it happening is in an instrumentality sequence OR a scene towards the very end if Shinji is granted the ability to change the world like in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jul 02, 2013 3:37 am I REALLY hope that we won't have a similar cop-out than in the manga, 3.0 whole premise(and Rebuild message in a way) is clear : you can not redo, stop looking for the past, it's the past and you can't come back to it, the only direction that exist is forward. Or stagnation, which led nowhere(Gendo is proof enough of that) The best I could see for FINAL is that a way to "decontaminate" the planet is found to give a chance to what remains of mankind. As for a "classroom scene", you mean a scene like the ones in 2.0 were we see the cast everyday life? Unlikely : even if the place where Shinji ends is a "Lilin City" with a school, most of the 2-A classroom from 2.0 is dead or 28 years old, Asuka is mentally 28 and a full-time EVA pilot, Rei a clone completely socially inept(and still considered as more of an enemy than a victim of Gendo's madness) and Shinji is an Impact Trigger(meaning having to be under constant custody by WILLE) and currently insane. One thing I could see is a variant of the everyday scenes in the Wunder, showing us what is the life of the crew were there isn't Nemesis Series trying to fry them or an Impact to stop, scene like, I don't know : Koji in a poker party with Aoba and Hyuuga, Asuka and Mari in a video-game duel, Kitakami standing in line his turn to use the communication system to talk with his mother(don't know why, but he strikes me as a Mama's boy!), Sakura's disastrous attempts to cook something during her spare time and trying to find someone to taste her food(don't ask me from where that comes from!), Shinji nearly dying because he accepted to taste Sakura's food(poor boy didn't know that it's a bizutage among the Wunder crew )... Or if really their would be one, I could see one at the very end of the movie if FINAL have a somewhat good end where Instrumentality is stopped and the world decontaminated, where we see Shinji, Rei and Asuka back at school to finish their studies in Lilin City's school : their still have a 14 years old body but the curse as been cured, and Asuka want to finally be able to experiment a normal life after 24 years as an EVA pilot, and her body still being at 14 give her that chance.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jul 02, 2013 4:00 am It'd have to be some kind of replay during Complementation, and would require Final to go full-on EoE head-trip at us, and I'm doubtful that such a thing will happen this time around.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Jul 02, 2013 4:37 am ElMariachi wrote: Kitakami standing in line his turn to use the communication system to talk with his mother(don't know why, but he strikes me as a Mama's boy!).

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jul 02, 2013 4:46 am Oh yes my bad, I was thinking about the guy surrounded with instruction manuals in 3.0, and I still can't remember his name!

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Jul 02, 2013 12:18 pm Tangent about school uniforms went here .

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Jul 02, 2013 1:31 pm Of course there will be a classroom scene. After Gendo is defeated every character (even the dead ones) gathers to Shinji's (former) classroom, Shinji smiles and gives "the nice guy" pose and the film ends. :O
